heading: Quality and efficiency measurement
label: 1395aaa–1 Quality and efficiency measurement

children.heading: Multi-stakeholder group input into selection of quality and efficiency measures
children.label: a Multi-stakeholder group input into selection of quality and efficiency measures

children.heading: Input
children.label: 1 Input
children.text: Pursuant to , the entity with a contract under shall convene multi-stakeholder groups to provide input to the Secretary on the selection of quality and efficiency measures described in subparagraph (B) of such paragraph.section 1395aaa(b)(7) of this titlesection 1395aaa of this title

children.heading: Public availability of measures considered for selection
children.label: 2 Public availability of measures considered for selection
children.text: Not later than December 1 of each year (beginning with 2011), the Secretary shall make available to the public a list of quality and efficiency measures described in that the Secretary is considering under this subchapter.section 1395aaa(b)(7)(B) of this title

children.heading: Transmission of multi-stakeholder input
children.label: 3 Transmission of multi-stakeholder input
children.text: Pursuant to , not later than February 1 of each year (beginning with 2012), the entity shall transmit to the Secretary the input of multi-stakeholder groups described in paragraph (1).section 1395aaa(b)(8) of this title

children.heading: Consideration of multi-stakeholder input
children.label: 4 Consideration of multi-stakeholder input
children.text: The Secretary shall take into consideration the input from multi-stakeholder groups described in paragraph (1) in selecting quality and efficiency measures described in that have been endorsed by the entity with a contract under and measures that have not been endorsed by such entity.section 1395aaa(b)(7)(B) of this titlesection 1395aaa of this title

children.heading: Rationale for use of quality and efficiency measures
children.label: 5 Rationale for use of quality and efficiency measures
children.text: The Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register the rationale for the use of any quality and efficiency measure described in that has not been endorsed by the entity with a contract under .section 1395aaa(b)(7)(B) of this titlesection 1395aaa of this title

children.label: A
children.text: conduct an assessment of the quality and efficiency impact of the use of endorsed measures described in ; andsection 1395aaa(b)(7)(B) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: make such assessment available to the public.

children.heading: Process for dissemination of measures used by the Secretary
children.label: b Process for dissemination of measures used by the Secretary
A
children.text: The incorporation of such measures, where applicable, in workforce programs, training curricula, and any other means of dissemination determined appropriate by the Secretary.

children.label: B
children.text: The dissemination of such quality and efficiency measures through the national strategy developed under .section 280j of this title

children.heading: Existing methods
children.label: 2 Existing methods
children.text: To the extent practicable, the Secretary shall utilize and expand existing dissemination methods in disseminating quality and efficiency measures under the process established under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Review of quality and efficiency measures used by the Secretary
children.label: c Review of quality and efficiency measures used by the Secretary
A
children.text: periodically (but in no case less often than once every 3 years) review quality and efficiency measures described in ; andsection 1395aaa(b)(7)(B) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: maintain the use of such measure; or

children.label: ii
children.text: phase out such measure.

children.label: A
children.text: seek to avoid duplication of measures used; and

children.label: B
children.text: take into consideration current innovative methodologies and strategies for quality and efficiency improvement practices in the delivery of health care services that represent best practices for such quality and efficiency improvement and measures endorsed by the entity with a contract under since the previous review by the Secretary.section 1395aaa of this title

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: d Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall preclude a State from using the quality and efficiency measures identified under sections 1320b–9a and 1320b–9b of this title.

children.heading: Development of quality and efficiency measures
children.label: e Development of quality and efficiency measures
children.text: The Administrator of the Center for Medicare & Medicaid Services shall through contracts develop quality and efficiency measures (as determined appropriate by the Administrator) for use under this chapter. In developing such measures, the Administrator shall consult with the Director of the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality.

children.heading: Hospital acquired conditions
children.label: f Hospital acquired conditions
children.text: The Secretary shall, to the extent practicable, publicly report on measures for hospital-acquired conditions that are currently utilized by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services for the adjustment of the amount of payment to hospitals based on rates of hospital-acquired infections.

children.heading: Technical expert panel review of opioid and opioid use disorder quality measures
children.label: g Technical expert panel review of opioid and opioid use disorder quality measures

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall establish a technical expert panel for purposes of reviewing quality measures relating to opioids and opioid use disorders, including care, prevention, diagnosis, health outcomes, and treatment furnished to individuals with opioid use disorders. The Secretary may use the entity with a contract under and amend such contract as necessary to provide for the establishment of such technical expert panel.October 24, 2018section 1395aaa(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: review quality measures that relate to opioids and opioid use disorders, including existing measures and those under development;

children.label: B
children.text: identify gaps in areas of quality measurement that relate to opioids and opioid use disorders, and identify measure development priorities for such measure gaps; and

children.label: C
children.text: make recommendations to the Secretary on quality measures with respect to opioids and opioid use disorders for purposes of improving care, prevention, diagnosis, health outcomes, and treatment, including recommendations for revisions of such measures, need for development of new measures, and recommendations for including such measures in the Merit-Based Incentive Payment System under , the alternative payment models under section 1395(z)(3)(C) of this title, the shared savings program under , the quality reporting requirements for inpatient hospitals under , and the hospital value-based purchasing program under section 1395ww() of this title.section 1395w–4(q) of this titlesection 1395jjj of this titlesection 1395ww(b)(3)(B)(viii) of this titlelo

children.label: A
children.text: using opioid and opioid use disorder measures (including measures used under the Merit-Based Incentive Payment System under , measures recommended under paragraph (2)(C), and other such measures identified by the Secretary) in alternative payment models under section 1395(z)(3)(C) of this title and in the shared savings program under ; andsection 1395w–4(q) of this titlesection 1395jjj of this titlel

children.label: B
children.text: using opioid measures described in subparagraph (A), as applicable, in the quality reporting requirements for inpatient hospitals under , and in the hospital value-based purchasing program under section 1395ww() of this title.section 1395ww(b)(3)(B)(viii) of this titleo

children.heading: Prioritization of measure development
children.label: 4 Prioritization of measure development
children.text: The Secretary shall prioritize for measure development the gaps in quality measures identified under paragraph (2)(B).

children.label: A
children.text: during the period beginning on , and ending on , shall prioritize the endorsement of measures relating to opioids and opioid use disorders by the entity with a contract under subsection (a) of in connection with endorsement of measures described in subsection (b)(2) of such section; andOctober 24, 2018December 31, 2023section 1395aaa of this title

children.label: B
children.text: on and after , may prioritize the endorsement of such measures by such entity.January 1, 2024
